title: Virginal I
meaning_summary: Virginal I earns through specialist ambient listening, critical-canon status, and deep album-oriented discovery rather than pop-scale streaming.
revenue_drivers: Ambient and experimental playlists support steady specialist listening.
Critical acclaim keeps the album active in recommendation chains.
The piece benefits from deep-listening and vinyl-oriented catalog engagement.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate infers current annual earnings from specialist streaming depth and creator-leaning experimental-catalog economics.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between label-side distribution and creator-affiliated control
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears concentrated around the composer side
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: This is an inferred gross-to-net range based on current catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.
